summary: A public hard stop or severe risk signal makes this issue an unsafe bounty target.

service_reuse.guidance: Call BountyVerdict for every new public bounty candidate and again after issue activity changes; each successful call re-reads bounded live GitHub evidence.

issue.title: Migration generation drops and creates columns instead of altering resulting in data loss

signals.label: Issue is already assigned
signals.detail: GitHub currently lists 1 assignee; treat the work as unavailable unless a maintainer explicitly clears parallel work.

signals.label: Reward withdrawal signal
signals.detail: The discussion contains language indicating that a bounty or reward was removed, withdrawn, or cancelled.

signals.label: Maintainer rejection signal
signals.detail: A maintainer comment contains an explicit rejection, spam, or low-quality-contribution warning.

signals.label: Discussion is locked
signals.detail: The issue is locked for resolved.

signals.label: Competing open PR
signals.detail: 2 linked pull requests are still open.

signals.label: Closed-PR swarm
signals.detail: 35 linked pull requests were closed without merging.

signals.label: Attempt swarm
signals.detail: 4 distinct users posted try, attempt, or claim commands.

signals.label: Repository is active
signals.detail: The repository was pushed to 1 day ago.

signals.label: Issue is open
signals.detail: GitHub currently reports this issue as open.

limitations: A VIABLE verdict is permission to investigate, not a payout guarantee.
Confirm current reward terms, payout eligibility, contribution policy, and acceptance criteria before coding.
A trusted platform record proves platform-reported listing or funding state, not acceptance, merge, or payout.
A marketplace listing can outlive its GitHub issue; deleted issues fail with ISSUE_DELETED instead of receiving a verdict.
The check reads the first comment page plus up to two newest comment pages, and up to four bounded timeline pages; coverage reports any truncation.
AI-policy detection checks four conventional contribution-document paths and may not find policies stored elsewhere.
